title: 🏆 Secured 1st Rank in Web Design During My MCA
author: Aman Kureshi
summary:
I’m excited to share that I’ve secured 🥇 1st Rank in Web Design during my MCA at KSV University.

From BCA to MCA, web design has been a major part of my learning journey. Competing in web design pushed me to continuously improve my creativity and frontend development skills.

💡 Key Areas I Focused On:
• Designing modern and user-friendly interfaces
• Building fully responsive layouts
• Strengthening frontend fundamentals with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

🙏 Special Thanks To:
• Shabbir Vaghela – My biggest mentor who guided me from basics to advanced.
• Yusuf Chauhan – For building my strong web design foundation.
• Imran Kureshi – For motivation and valuable industry insights.

This achievement reflects the power of consistency, learning, and mentorship.

🚀 Moving forward, I’m excited to keep building real-world projects and grow as a Frontend Developer.

🔗 GitHub:
full_text:
I’m excited to share that I’ve secured 🥇 1st Rank in Web Design during my MCA at KSV University.

From BCA to MCA, web design has been a major part of my learning journey. Competing in web design pushed me to continuously improve my creativity and frontend development skills.

💡 Key Areas I Focused On:

• Designing modern and user-friendly interfaces

• Building fully responsive layouts

• Strengthening frontend fundamentals with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

🙏 Special Thanks To:

• Shabbir Vaghela – My biggest mentor who guided me from basics to advanced.

• Yusuf Chauhan – For building my strong web design foundation.

• Imran Kureshi – For motivation and valuable industry insights.

This achievement reflects the power of consistency, learning, and mentorship.

🚀 Moving forward, I’m excited to keep building real-world projects and grow as a Frontend Developer.

🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/amankureshi
